styleTag: * { margin: 0; padding: 0; border: 0; overflow: hidden!important; } html, body { width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden!important; background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0); } iframe { width: 100%; height: 100%; border: none; overflow: hidden!important; display: block; background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0); }
